title: Video by quantjason

segments.text: to make you a guaranteed $89,000 right now.
Literally the most guaranteed thing I've ever seen.
Literally bet that Jesus Christ does not return before GTA 6.
So either your Lord and Savior returns,
which is a huge upside, or you make almost 100 bones.
Also work views, it was like a dub to me.

full_text: to make you a guaranteed $89,000 right now. Literally the most guaranteed thing I've ever seen. Literally bet that Jesus Christ does not return before GTA 6. You bet $100,000, you make $89,000. So either your Lord and Savior returns, which is a huge upside, or you make almost 100 bones. Also work views, it was like a dub to me.
